title: Supply of Motor Vehicles for Enhancement of Intra-Town Mail Delivery
description: National competitive bidding for supply, delivery, inspection, testing and commissioning of 8 brand new motor vehicles (6 Single Cabin Delivery Vans 1.5T, 2 Light Duty Trucks 3.5T) for intra-town mail delivery in Dar es Salaam. Bids via NeST.

contact.name: The Postmaster General
contact.address: Posta House, 7 Ghana Street, P.O. Box 9551, 11300 Dar es Salaam

eligibility: Registered on NeST. Bidders eligible as per Public Procurement Act.
